title: calathea sanderiana
intro: Calathea sanderiana, also known as the Maranta, is a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Calathea sanderiana include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in the management of respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve boiling the leaves in water to create a tea that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
